mapper.select:
SELECT
b.comment_idx as commentIdx, b.content,
DATE_FORMAT(b.date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated, DATE_FORMAT(b.date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified,
DATE_FORMAT(b.date_created, '%b %e %Y') as dateCreated, DATE_FORMAT(b.date_modified, '%b %e %Y') as dateModified,
b.user_name as userName, b.board_article_idx as boardArticleIdx, b.parent_idx as parentIdx
FROM
comment b, board_article c
WHERE
b.delete_yn = 'N'
AND b.board_article_idx = #{boardArticleIdx}
AND b.board_article_idx = c.board_article_idx
AND c.open_yn = 'y'
ORDER BY
b.date_created DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( content, date_created, user_password, user_name, board_article_idx, parent_idx, user_ip ) VALUES ( #{content}, now(), #{userPassword}, #{userName}, #{boardArticleIdx}, #{parentIdx}, #{userIp} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
count(*) as checkCount
FROM
comment b
WHERE
user_password = SHA2( #{userPassword}, 0 )
user_password = #{userPassword}
and comment_idx = #{commentIdx}

SELECT
b.comment_idx as commentIdx, b.content, DATE_FORMAT(b.date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated, DATE_FORMAT(b.date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified, b.user_name as userName, b.board_article_idx as boardArticleIdx, c.subject as boardArticleSubject, b.parent_idx as parentIdx
FROM
comment b, board_article c
WHERE
b.delete_yn = 'N'
AND b.board_article_idx = c.board_article_idx
ORDER BY
b.date_created DESC
LIMIT
#{skipCount}, #{listLimit}

SELECT
count(*)
FROM
comment b, board_article c
WHERE
b.delete_yn = 'N'
AND b.board_article_idx = c.board_article_idx
